title: VulnScan
description: A full-scale web penetration testing tool with 20+ modules including SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, API security testing, and AI-powered vulnerability detection. Published as a PyPI package for professional security audits.

title: Luminary Portfolio
description: A visually immersive photography portfolio designed with a focus on storytelling, smooth interactions, and aesthetic presentation. Built to showcase creative work through modern layouts, fluid animations, and a clean user experience.

title: SaaSify
description: A hyper-modern SaaS landing page built with React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Focused on smooth animations, scroll-based interactions, and premium UI/UX inspired by top-tier product websites.

title: Neon Commerce
description: A Gen-Z focused sneaker e-commerce website with bold visuals, interactive layouts, and modern design systems. Built to deliver a high-energy shopping experience with strong branding.

title: Dino Portfolio
description: An experimental interactive portfolio inspired by the Chrome Dino game. Built with a custom 1-bit style and physics logic, blending creativity with development for a unique user experience.
